description: Legal query addressed to the Gaon and Nasi Daniel b. ʿAzarya in Jerusalem with regard to the goods of a merchant, Moshe b. Yehuda ha-Ma'arvi, who died at sea on a commercial journey to Sicily. The goods were registered under the name of his partner, Ḥasan ha-Kohen b. SulIīmān, in order to avoid taxes in Sicily. See also T-S 20.152 (PGPID 1783) and T-S NS J161 + T-S 12.5 (PGPID 1676).
